person_name: Claudia, daughter of Fulvia and Publius Claudius (first wife of Augustus)
person_name_full: Claudia, daughter of Fulvia and Publius Claudius (first wife of Augustus)
notes: Daughter of Fulvia and Publius Claudius, first wife of Augustus, noted for her purity and devotion.

docs.title: Letter 4
docs.author: Sulpicius Severus
docs.subject_summary: Dubious letter 1 to Claudia Concerning the Last Judgment
docs.excerpt: … faith at the very beginning of your saintly life, you display a devoted love in Christ. docs.title: Life of Augustus
docs.author: Suetonius
docs.excerpt: Soon afterwards he took to wife Scribonia, who had before been twice married to men of consular rank , and was a mother by one of them. With her likewise he parted , being quite tired out, as he himself writes, with the perverseness of her
